synced:
[00:01.99]Oh, boy
[00:10.31]You said your phone was broken
[00:12.49]Just forgot to charge it
[00:14.66]Whole outfit you're wearing
[00:15.86]God, I hope it's ironic
[00:18.21]Did you just say you're finished?
[00:19.83]Didn't know we started
[00:21.97]It's all just so familiar
[00:23.68]Baby, what do you call it?
[00:27.94]Stupid
[00:29.66]Or is it
[00:31.40]Slow?
[00:33.59]Maybe it's
[00:35.83]Useless?
[00:37.81]But there's a cuter word for it
[00:39.73]I know
[00:41.44]Manchild
[00:45.36]Why you always come a-running to me?
[00:49.21]Fuck my life
[00:53.19]Won't you let an innocent woman be?
[00:57.06]Never heard of self-care
[01:00.99]Half your brain just ain't there
[01:04.89]Manchild
[01:08.78]Why you always come a-running
[01:11.22]Taking all my loving from me?
[01:21.15]Why so sexy
[01:23.20]If so dumb?
[01:24.69]And how survive the earth so long?
[01:28.58]If I'm not there, it won't get done
[01:32.48]I choose to blame your mom
[01:35.93]Manchild
[01:40.02]Why you always come a-running to me?
[01:43.80]Fuck my life
[01:47.81]Won't you let an innocent woman be?
[01:51.72]Never heard of self-care
[01:55.60]Half your brain just ain't there
[01:59.31]Manchild
[02:03.36]Why you always come a-running
[02:05.81]Taking all my loving from me?
[02:07.94]Oh, I like my boys playing hard to get
[02:11.23]And I like my men all incompetent
[02:15.16]And I swear they choose me
[02:17.49]I'm not choosing them
[02:19.08]Amen
[02:21.16]Hey, men!
[02:22.94]Oh, I like my boys playing hard to get
[02:26.80]And I like my men all incompetent
[02:30.75]And I swear they choose me
[02:33.18]I'm not choosing them
[02:34.68]Amen (Amen)
[02:36.73]Hey, men! (Hey, men!)
[02:38.56]Manchild
[02:42.43]Why you always come a-running to me? (Always come a-running to me)
[02:46.29]Fuck my life
[02:50.22]Won't you let an innocent woman be?
[02:54.14]Oh, I like my boys playing hard to get
[02:58.03]And I like my men all incompetent
[03:01.96]And I swear they choose me
[03:04.33]I'm not choosing them
[03:05.91]Amen
[03:08.18]Hey, men!
[03:10:00]
